title: keysseria pickeringii
intro: Keysseria pickeringii is a plant species, also known as Chinese Angelica or Qianghuo, which is a type of flowering plant in the carrot family (Apiaceae). Keysseria pickeringii has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and analgesic effects, which help to relieve pain and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to improve cardiovascular health, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. Keysseria pickeringii can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to the skin for therapeutic benefits.
